title: Ten Minutes for Luffy — Closing Beat
description: The fighters of Dressrosa protect Luffy until his Haki returns for the final blow.
scene: On pages 20–21, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As a sign of our repen- Tance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We will trust in your words...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...and put our lives on the line!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sorry in advance if we beat him first!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Right! Half of you, follow me!!!

summary: This part focuses on ten minutes for luffy, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
